notes: Editorial addition aligned with the existing A2 compare family. CEFR confirmed in dedicated review on 2026-03-21.

de.definition: Das Betrachten von zwei oder mehr Dingen, um Ähnlichkeiten oder Unterschiede festzustellen.
examples: Wenn man beide Angebote nebeneinander legt, wird die Entscheidung leichter.

it.definition: L'osservazione di due o più cose per vedere somiglianze o differenze.
examples: Se metti le due offerte una accanto all'altra, la decisione diventa più facile.

en.definition: Looking at two or more things to see similarities or differences.
examples: Putting the two offers side by side makes the decision easier.

de.definition: Zwei oder mehr Dinge bewusst nebeneinander prüfen, um Ähnlichkeiten oder Unterschiede zu sehen.
de.usage_note: Gemeint ist das bewusste Gegenüberstellen von Dingen, nicht bloß das Feststellen eines einzelnen Unterschieds.
examples: Wir schauen uns die Preise der beiden Hotels genau an.
Lege die zwei Texte nebeneinander und achte auf die Unterschiede.

it.definition: Mettere due o più cose una accanto all'altra per vedere somiglianze o differenze.
it.usage_note: Indica un confronto intenzionale, non il semplice notare una singola differenza.
examples: Guardiamo con attenzione i prezzi dei due hotel.
Metti i due testi uno accanto all'altro e nota le differenze.

en.definition: To examine two or more things side by side to see similarities or differences.
en.usage_note: This means making an intentional comparison, not just noticing one difference.
examples: We are looking closely at the prices of the two hotels.
Put the two texts side by side and notice the differences.

notes: Editorial addition from English lemma expansion. Modeled around the general idea of distance between places or points. German uses Entfernung as the neutral concrete term; Distanz is also accepted here as a common cognate and broader or slightly more formal alternative. Kept separate from the race-specific sense already covered elsewhere.

de.definition: Der Abstand zwischen zwei Orten oder Punkten.
de.usage_note: Entfernung ist die neutrale Standardwahl für messbare räumliche Distanz; Distanz ist hier ebenfalls akzeptiert, klingt aber oft etwas formeller oder breiter.
examples: Zwischen dem Dorf und der Stadt liegen fast zwanzig Kilometer.

it.definition: Lo spazio che separa due luoghi o due punti.
examples: Tra il paese e la città ci sono quasi venti chilometri.

en.definition: The amount of space between two places or points.
examples: There are almost twenty kilometers between the village and the city.

notes: Editorial addition from German lemma expansion. Modeled around the gap or safe space between people or things, not the general route-length sense already covered by Entfernung. CEFR placed editorially at A2 on 2026-04-17.

de.definition: Der freie Raum oder die ausreichende Distanz zwischen Personen oder Dingen.
de.usage_note: Hier geht es eher um Zwischenraum oder Sicherheitsabstand als um die Strecke zwischen zwei Orten; dafür steht eher Entfernung.
examples: Lass bitte genug Platz zum vorderen Auto.

it.definition: Lo spazio o margine da lasciare tra persone o cose.
it.usage_note: Qui soprattutto nel senso di spazio o distanza di sicurezza, non della lunghezza di un percorso.
examples: Mantieni qualche metro rispetto all'auto davanti.

en.definition: The space or safe distance between people or things.
en.usage_note: This focuses on gap or clearance, not the general distance between places.
examples: Keep a couple of meters from the car in front.

notes: Editorial addition aligned with the existing compare family. Modeled as the noun difference sense and kept separate from the adjective unterschiedlich. CEFR placed editorially at A2 on 2026-04-17.

de.definition: Etwas, worin zwei oder mehr Dinge nicht gleich sind.
examples: Die beiden Geräte sehen ähnlich aus, funktionieren aber nicht gleich.

it.definition: Cio in cui due o piu cose non sono uguali.
examples: I due dispositivi sembrano simili, ma non funzionano allo stesso modo.

en.definition: The way in which two or more things are not the same.
examples: The two devices look similar, but they do not work in the same way.
